# --- SYSTEM GLOBAL / HARDENING ---
config system global
    set hostname FGT-HQ-01
    set timezone Europe/Rome
    set admintimeout 15
    set strong-crypto enable
    set admin-https-redirect enable
    set admin-lockout-threshold 3
    set admin-lockout-duration 120
    set post-login-banner enable
end
config system replacemsg admin post_admin-disclaimer-text
    set buffer "Accesso riservato"
end

# --- ADMIN LOCALE AGGIUNTIVO ---
config system admin
    edit netadmin
        set password Adm1nPwd!
        set accprofile "super_admin"
    next
end

# --- INTERFACCE ---
config system interface
    edit mgmt
        set mode static
        set ip 10.0.99.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping https ssh
        set alias "MGMT"
    next
    edit port1
        set mode static
        set ip 203.0.113.10 255.255.255.248
        set allowaccess ping
        set alias "WAN"
        set role wan
    next
    edit port2
        set mode static
        set ip 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping
        set alias "LAN"
        set role lan
        set device-identification enable
    next
end

# --- DEFAULT ROUTE ---
config router static
    edit 1
        set gateway 203.0.113.9
        set device port1
    next
end

# --- DNS ---
config system dns
    set primary 1.1.1.1
    set secondary 8.8.8.8
end

# --- NTP ---
config system ntp
    set ntpsync enable
    set type custom
    config ntpserver
        edit 1
            set server 10.0.0.1
        next
        edit 2
            set server 10.0.0.2
        next
    end
end

# --- DHCP SERVER (LAN) ---
config system dhcp server
    edit 1
        set default-gateway 192.168.1.1
        set netmask 255.255.255.0
        set interface port2
        config ip-range
            edit 1
                set start-ip 192.168.1.100
                set end-ip 192.168.1.200
            next
        end
        set dns-server1 1.1.1.1
    next
end

# --- SYSLOG ---
config log syslogd setting
    set status enable
    set server 10.0.0.5
end

# --- SNMPv3 ---
config system snmp sysinfo
    set status enable
    set description FGT-HQ-01
end
config system snmp user
    edit snmpuser
        set security-level auth-priv
        set auth-proto sha
        set auth-pwd authpwd123
        set priv-proto aes
        set priv-pwd privpwd123
    next
end

# --- LOG RICHIESTE REST API ---
config log setting
    set rest-api-set enable
    set rest-api-get enable
end

# --- FIREWALL POLICY LAN -> WAN (NAT) ---
config firewall policy
    edit 1
        set name "LAN-to-WAN"
        set srcintf port2
        set dstintf port1
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set action accept
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
        set logtraffic all
    next
end
